001package guiFirstAdmin;
002
003/*******
004 * <p> Title: ModelFirstAdmin Class. </p>
005 * 
006 * <p> Description: The First System Startup Page Model.  This class is not used as there is no
007 * data manipulated by this MVC beyond accepting a username and password and then saving it in the
008 * database.  When the code is enhanced for input validation, this model may be needed.</p>
009 * 
010 * <p> Copyright: Lynn Robert Carter © 2025 </p>
011 * 
012 * @author Lynn Robert Carter
013 * 
014 * @version 1.00                2025-08-15 Initial version
015 *  
016 */
017
018public class ModelFirstAdmin {
019
020}
